# Regenzeit Nürnberg

> Authentic Thai street food restaurant in Nürnberg-Gostenhof, Germany

Run by Benno and Aey Bartels since 2014. Since January 2025 located at
Hessestraße 4, 90443 Nürnberg. Bangkok-style street food —
noodle soups, rice salads, curries. All dishes available vegan.

Google rating: 4.9 / 5 (780+ reviews)

## Dishes (selection)

- **Lek Haeng** — warm vegetables, herbs, house-roasted peanuts. Vegan, with chicken or duck. From €11.
- **Tom Yam** — glass noodles, fish, mussels, shrimp, surimi, mushrooms. €14.50.
- **Klebreis mit Mango** (Sticky Rice with Mango) — dessert. €4.50.
- All main dishes available vegan, vegetarian, or with meat/fish.

## Atmosphere

Small, personal, relaxed. Green plants, warm light, colourful armchairs, a piano.
Glass skylight roof. LGBTQ+ friendly. Kids' corner. Dogs welcome on the terrace.
Catering available on request.

## Features

- Vegan, vegetarian, and meat/fish options for every dish
- Catering on request
- Kids' corner
- Outdoor seating / terrace
- Free WiFi
- LGBTQ+ friendly
- No reservation required

## Opening Hours

Tuesday – Saturday: 11:30–14:30 & 17:00–22:00
Sunday & Monday: closed
Kitchen closes at 20:45

## Contact

Hessestraße 4, 90443 Nürnberg (Gostenhof district)
Phone: +49 911 18099765
Email: info@regenzeit-gostenhof.de
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/regenzeit.goho/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/regenzeit.goho/
